name: session-recording
description: Record a sequence of actions, save, then play back.

steps.expect: async (response, ctx) => { const r = ctx.agent.sessionRecordStart({ label: 'test-session' }); return [ {ok: r.ok === true, message: 'start ok'}, {ok: r.sessionId.startsWith('sess-'), message: 'sessionId assigned'} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { const before = ctx.agent._recorder.actions.length; await ctx.agent.runBrowserAction('getVisibleText'); await ctx.agent.runBrowserAction('inspectPage'); const after = ctx.agent._recorder.actions.length; return [{ok: after === before + 2, message: `+2 actions (before=${before}, after=${after})`}]; }

async (response, ctx) => { const expectedCount = ctx.agent._recorder.actions.length; const r = ctx.agent.sessionRecordStop(); return [ {ok: r.ok === true, message: 'stop ok'}, {ok: r.actionCount === expectedCount, message: `actionCount matches (expected ${expectedCount}, got ${r.actionCount})`}, {ok: r.actions.length === expectedCount, message: `actions length matches`} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { ctx.agent.sessionRecordStart({ label: 'persist-test' }); await ctx.agent.runBrowserAction('getVisibleText'); const r = await ctx.agent.sessionRecordSave({}); return [ {ok: r.ok === true, message: 'save ok'}, {ok: r.saved === true, message: 'saved flag true'} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { const r = await ctx.agent.sessionRecordList(); return [ {ok: r.ok === true, message: 'list ok'}, {ok: r.count >= 1, message: `at least 1 saved session (got ${r.count})`} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { const list = await ctx.agent.sessionRecordList(); const sessionId = list.sessions[0].sessionId; const r = await ctx.agent.sessionRecordPlay({ sessionId }); return [ {ok: r.ok === true, message: 'play ok'}, {ok: r.totalActions >= 1, message: `actions executed (got ${r.totalActions})`} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { const list = await ctx.agent.sessionRecordList(); const sessionId = list.sessions[0].sessionId; const r = await ctx.agent.sessionRecordDelete({ sessionId }); return [ {ok: r.ok === true, message: 'delete ok'} ]; }
